meaning: 米德尔塞克斯郡[英国英格兰原郡名]
examples: Middlesex's Steve Finn will remain with the squad in Australia to provide pace bowling cover.
Only three counties have squads which have no ICL connections - Somerset, Essex and Middlesex.
The major hospitals would be Chelsea and Westminster, Hillingdon, Northwick Park, St Mary's and West Middlesex.
